title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Texas Instruments India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Texas Instruments India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Texas Instruments India International Enterprises in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Texas Instruments India International Enterprises:
Texas Instruments India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Texas Instruments India International Enterprises!
